Peter - just this week I announced my run for Governor.

_And as you might've guessed... _

_**That made us a huge target of the radical left. **_

They're rallying supporters, they're raising money, and coming after me.

But I have something they don't... YOU. It's people like you - who are standing up to their socialist "solutions," their cancel culture, and their censorship - that stops them and makes my campaign STRONG.

And with our first End-Of-Month fundraising deadline approaching on January 31st, I want you on my team OFFICIALLY by making a contribution TODAY!
**Will you join me as an EXCLUSIVE Founding Member of our campaign?**
[**YES >>>**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3a31574affc942549cb2f36f05c2097c&_e=o0bAMOiUVHcHfJPSrTDYL8yeqo6NCHqkg0ubXAAi33jSgUmXTkxZ0XMEbAV2MUHK5xJB2cI2evXgTgZV9vTAbWNP8iUZvXbhORyXYFWaIgtoZthBprN7roq4cUplIucpoVlGXvYE6L-i84xDVjhBCVAxiWxO_7FNbKhDSw7iCyIhotJSphft6wuVeHL4urDzXXAaJmANVhPYqbP-qRZ5WCrb7nSRnHtvBjirfNI8_p7ER7v9PJ9ksZO4YHnnm8tqb-HBb4vIwXw4uUxgfBRcohmbX0sLJZv5V4DkuDDLYl4s9yEBUOs2ZmbXqWnIWXQ30k3F5VCYEy-F_YjhdV-sHvTHZyebeu4X5flNXJqCkVfaoVnrtx5k3coBPnMn0kIaMKqWKm4i2P3m_3muO5ubfBpmBm8x_Igbzw10MD17YPcP1NcB0oZ8_FdxbZT5sDxBdd_uin5xZeNMxFF1mN6y-YlXEftIatHlTeeWsCV1_Os%3D)
Peter, this is something I'm offering to only our most loyal supporters and I'll let you know why: our Founding Members will have access to exclusive campaign-only information, polls, and surveys. If you accept, I'll be contacting you for opinions and counting on you to faithfully share our message with friends and neighbors.

I'm only asking people I know I can trust.

I am opening up 250 Founding Member spots and the offer EXPIRES at our End-Of-Month deadline on January 31st at 11:59PM.

Can you join me today to become a Founding Member by chipping in $10 and help make our first End-Of-Month effort a huge success?
[**YES, CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3a31574affc942549cb2f36f05c2097c&_e=o0bAMOiUVHcHfJPSrTDYL8yeqo6NCHqkg0ubXAAi33jSgUmXTkxZ0XMEbAV2MUHK5xJB2cI2evXgTgZV9vTAbWx005B3WURjwJKyUr36MOARvqttzkTPvmHMh0LgkVfYcRtMPMSVbHuBj8vWJjaiBM569Ub_0jkDYhS8oWyBEQnreG_Yw2kUYI_VzlbCoBA4ejlSnZwDEdOImkpez3jbONR-feySN4UOdKDDkACTRPd55ywVFbR74pjwsZyiRKBUyNo_6Z6Vhl1pYqVJsb7QLb_oEL3EWUPqDzqqDA1899bNPb-ZFM_daYWaJP5ul0GN2F9h6AlMoI-9PEtICvGzERCTf_p9OdWhhDyQszr0xplCZrfRrL8vuJZ1AiXRLRRsG3qItjBgv2l_lrgj5rGK9nadw6rDI8KRTO0WjYkFxRI8FDSCmd0HFpnKhqfw3QiJiVF2ht4gjGtcFoCYCN4Hps7_ryIAIPDQ3UXuiiXXWZw%3D)

Peter, I really hope to have you on board.

Just contribute $10 here to join today: **[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-1954276/](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3a31574affc942549cb2f36f05c2097c&_e=o0bAMOiUVHcHfJPSrTDYL8yeqo6NCHqkg0ubXAAi33jSgUmXTkxZ0XMEbAV2MUHK5xJB2cI2evXgTgZV9vTAbWx005B3WURjwJKyUr36MOARvqttzkTPvmHMh0LgkVfYcRtMPMSVbHuBj8vWJjaiBM569Ub_0jkDYhS8oWyBEQnreG_Yw2kUYI_VzlbCoBA4ejlSnZwDEdOImkpez3jbONR-feySN4UOdKDDkACTRPd55ywVFbR74pjwsZyiRKBUyNo_6Z6Vhl1pYqVJsb7QLWmQsE7hnbKgb_Yijpa8Xvq17O5yimjGkFeXWHoam7rg4vJIezuBJastPbCau5gylyP0pbmyuxL-lNuHc12v57ue54-8tFMbvLiF6U06Bl22wIAC8QEDREaQOqIUgEjjD6ZLFjGmBJMCrHVpueMV0xP1Hcx2DqEph5GzULfxqYu56wQI3VauqERAaK50mvtiXStWOZd4YrCtuS7xszdsPnk%3D)**

_**And if you can[contribute more than $50](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3a31574affc942549cb2f36f05c2097c&_e=o0bAMOiUVHcHfJPSrTDYL8yeqo6NCHqkg0ubXAAi33jSgUmXTkxZ0XMEbAV2MUHK5xJB2cI2evXgTgZV9vTAbUB7nInhOD99vHRRau_VMYyu6i2mL14xjIO3V3yq3eSOQibEki6DmkD9fSprEJ1HHMatSZX-dYcTrnJcShZ_v353GXqY3_toydZ-A3RTTD3yFZ2mpHROHBUfJMmLEZ-xZhhrdPQxghK6AZQL5CzxhvsEwMEpvTyMmqqdnBLZJz3usZr-0eiOVx9OvqarKZM0G35KyQlWEp6K15sXtepo4sy9SV5BSm7l7gK3-SYNMFry5tO1wCVHDdNnLU3ys2KcSM1aXBnQhAPhoNMlaJr46xIGLZ1Q7t5COlPAnpuxZLUZZEU8A5OIFSKDig55W-WbqbOnCcKVsGHiHW20Cw2MigPQBwPW8uz_0D-D_Tx_5ESEpYEYKqhhwIzF4YaI7QAxOKBkNovsbV18CB_j9MlXItA%3D), we'll send you a T-Shirt too!**_

Thank you, Peter.

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

subject: Just a few hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | Derek,
I’m writing from my phone so I’ll get straight to the point: **We only have a few hours left before tonight’s critical end-of-month deadline.** Earlier this week, we set a goal of raising $25,000 before midnight tonight. Now, we’re _really_ close. Will you use this secure link to make the last-minute donation we need to reach our goal? (Reminder: Any donation made before midnight will be doubled thanks to a generous group of donors). **Chip in using this secure link:**[**https://secure.trm/Jan2021/x43k**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOZ40tQJEmal20NWedZ7Sad9xiiArDFyG0UqjXuw6irFHziWi-vBXe89Q1Eotj48awsIj3Y7JSAvRg2Ask-BvynTHx_PYd3TF1D7Iyh2KsqRQ4RSTMjkQwwlJvmlexBiaYrgYrwdc-fA1_UEf_CB6NGmL0y0n5WIuUoycAMDoi_ZQ7AFn3tNC_fxKbEOw67b6gZZ05dTEN8sYBv_HzI8OpSDUMQbKufgovKBOnr1ZzZXlqeA21Nwvsm-CnuowE5r8Jh9Kx7J10jhikonU86Yn3_Q/392/6Jf1s_1pSKGihphmrYP8jA/h0/uhDgU4SDQCWgVHtQSY9QH1mbrOmBc_I6evZMC9GwIyI) Look, Derek, I’m not running for Governor for the pomp and circumstance. I’m running because I’ve seen who the Republicans are likely to put forward -- pro-Trump right-wingers who have no business in the Governor’s office. And I can’t bear to see Virginia fall backwards into chaos and conspiracy. We can do better -- but we have to be united. Thanks for fighting with me, Terry McAuliffe Sent from my iPhone

[Take our 2021 Priorities Survey!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hbh00QfBST3o9hh2yfHS5lVtrfEL1W2R5wzCZrZX75sHv-r8b6Z7STL2_-JYg8FtxrFvxKZtlEzzi7p8a3uSGDIUUbgFn3FMhjoahRBupc_Tfon-M2L95UXNnMCkSJVMDwqwzHrUb8i9TbyxPseAMS8qXsZK3mxgHIeHE8A5Vo33t7heonf0LhwduD8se3tMDTnB6Spao9QVa69LSy6Clvf-tJRvDaa3t3a0YvomzYHKl-ulgvWZltV0GMvtZEKSvmqXgi1Gh_iR6OC9tore7DLVPWSq73u3orcmuD3yjeyetpNgn6th9hPhOi-KVWprTICFZz908HwMouPtjIx9wH145GVnpSCjXw1K5IEpTpklpZ4_enhDhWGhCgUaJz03hrC4ue42hT15R4ELLVKTY0ykjTnh1z-C2B9ttD7hscOI6AY7X4ICuA==&c=vsNz-wWOKbkPrPees-WMDhyiZDAd1PV7e8jHAfWAVOIdtXbtgbEFEw==&ch=unxRZaO5Y9syb8kDh3NVhwdaxPsgZSLtQ-cxX61ztbEQIYYw897BNA==)
These past few weeks Biden and the Democrats have made it clear they are only focused on their socialist agenda. clean_body: While this is the last email I wanted to send today, I have to ask for you to rush in an emergency 2x matched donation. Reaching our goal is simply too important. == Friend, I'm afraid I have bad news. Last night, we fell short -- by $5,091. The first deadline of the year, this was our chance to set the tone and lay the groundwork for how the next two years will go. Falling short doesn't bode well. So while this is the last email I wanted to send today, I have to ask for you to rush in an emergency 2x matched donation. Reaching our goal is simply too important. == == | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == EXTENDED DEADLINE LIVE UNTIL 11:59PM TONIGHT As an immigrant, conservative woman, Young Kim is exactly who the Democrats don't want in Congress -- but as a common-sense leader committed to putting Americans first, she is exactly who Congress needs. Missing our mark means putting lower taxes, fewer regulations, a stronger economy, job creation, affordable healthcare, and the House Majority on the line. Over the past four years, the Left has spent $20,000,000.00+ against us and they are prepared to spend millions more to win this seat back. == It's the only way to win back the House for Republicans. It will be long and it will be tough. But it's important. We defied the odds and flipped what Cook Political Report rated a "likely D" from blue to red. Now, we have to defend it. Thank you, Taylor Team Young== == == == During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == ** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: How could this happen, Friend?

We have bad news, Friend.

The numbers don't add up, and we are still $1,342.45 SHORT of our January goal, and we need your help before our budget meeting with John tomorrow morning.

We have extended our January deadline until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to guarantee we can tell John our 2021 budget plan will run smoothly.

I’m absolutely blown away by the over 5,000 early supporters that have once again rallied around our conservative, common sense campaign on........... Peter, I’m absolutely blown away by the over 5,000 early supporters that have once again rallied around our conservative, common sense campaign on day one. You and your stories are what have brought me back to this place, and I am looking forward to representing you in the near future. It is overdue for YOU and your values to be represented by someone who respects your opinion and wants to help bring REAL change to Washington, D.C. Peter, I’m going to cut to the chase. I cannot run this race alone, nor would I want to. I need to know that from the VERY start, you will be a part of my team. **[Can I count on you to join quickly so that we’re able to quickly build a very large team of conservatives here in Pennsylvania who are committed to bringing our conservative values BACK to the area?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=1af690bf2a4744388e15f536dbd9212f&_e=pX05EaDQSUe9-oL4WArJx-WDqPygFsxWnjMWv2r7BxAHsto1JxHPgsjy5DvOrJgl67jRIiWSVLj2wOQi9OSqjYZ78vbzIXJZURqZhqLdtyPQ-YeM5_BA0pCuQJk5jj7EgOXMt6Bz80JHgQW_-wcx01hztC9Ymw0iprM2jJDZDSiex7L0HFmIbW29DTO2EX5MPwpU1pXnT_Z_LFUiCW0eDEMNW9MZ-mH5tXwaq3aXh9wODUb8cS-Tvg2L91B-lULU2uIiadRTJRpb6ZvmXn4ohfhg7V951OewZrY7_xQtwe7K7NmunIVMVNgr9uxXljOCM-m1XmCEKyNFUqErFol1nvp5lji7EMnPt3E59niDyzVx62vhIzcGWKI9MdyqhJhNjYPqQZrHcq-MthD-NS2jnpkGpHxAZ_BXqEWKPovD9vSzs64RcStCCK4eX_a2UoHx-jBgz5MwHZZF9TyopAvn-QiwcssI2HDIPBTBIq5Ky8A%3D)** _**BECOME AN EARLY SUPPORTER

name: Flip CA-25
subject: Mike Garcia's "accomplishments" in the 117th Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Less than a month into the 117th Congress, Mike Garcia has already proved _just how dedicated_ he is to serving our district and standing up for our country.

1. On January 6th -- _after_ Trump-inspired insurrectionists took over the U.S. Capitol -- Mike voted to overturn millions of votes in Arizona and Pennsylvania. _(That's how you know he'll always fight for your voice to be heard in our elections.)_

2. In the aftermath of the riots, Mike didn't condemn the politicians who supported the Big Lie that the elections were fraudulent. _(After all, all politicians lie to the people -- that's just how politics goes.)_

3. On January 13th, as Congress debated impeachment, Mike hung out with QAnon-believer Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene. _(No need to worry about her conspiracy theories -- Marjorie just speaks her mind.)_

4. Unlike Democrats and 10 members of his own party, Mike didn't uphold his oath to protect and defend the Constitution by holding Donald Trump accountable through impeachment. _(Obviously, 10 Republicans breaking with Trump was plenty -- no one else needed to speak up against an attempted coup.)_

**[If you agree that we need to defeat Mike Garcia and flip the 25th in 2022, please chip in $5 -- or anything you can -- right now. The Democrats spent $11 million attacking us and outspent us 3:1. They spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation... and now, Pelosi's handpicked candidate has declared a rematch.

With the Democrats already organizing against us, meeting our goal now is the only way to ensure we have the resources to take on our opponent and win. The House Majority hinges on the outcome of this race. [**Can you chip in $10 right now to take back the House for Republicans?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xod42PLzGCvSWlIzgThudvgEl6TDAhYPtbGx_ACGu8hOqFGXIMnuzuSyvq48gzoO1GTi0iEwcJ565s_uv7WHuD9I4Fpwrln-h7XnxGa8hITutyWVCWXLtCuIrj9UyFwXTsVfbVq1EjE3R9W_mtbo4J9N2PWTM9QKgjL9aSr7HrKPEkRgTaQFGmfdNjtDW-bSJDuXHZJzNIPD8CahD75TEmK2xEdaY6OooapDdy22IiOsOQJ2pqsTbO-P9j-EQH5mp6Ym6zP0C549AbbRs46vqj0VBkwQLE2mZgfWF-5ZKFdfC73svQyPZr-DojsCOkL5tP-J6ku7aNOTRtAx9PAkdqgo795pP1KpK0i8FabvXB63psBPPcuN6-nWUWoB8YDqNE3Ynbm9ne62uaqdRvEK59saXqE02agH2dPi_FUiIy-U1xPDWGqfFRy0OV-r5I3ZpGP5xRXtpvY=&c=F-kcYzsUYX6DbbunVaQ327ujZxa-aRO32P3QLmt4sw_5O2RyTyfj5g==&ch=8YfpB4nSVrqbGaDoH8OgFbw5hpTEZum1k_VMYdjRB3L6hg7P8y-I3g==)

Friend, Michelle came to America as a young woman in search of opportunity. After witnessing the broken political system and unjust taxes tear down her mother's small business, she knew she had to step up and fight on behalf of small business owners and California taxpayers. Michelle Steel is working to do just that, having returned over $400 million to California taxpayers already.

clean_body: ** . == I checked. I double checked. I triple checked. And I'm afraid I have some bad news: last night we fell short of our goal by $1,018. We can 't start the year off behind, so Michelle has agreed to extend our first deadline of 2021 to TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT. That means if only 102 people chip in $10 by then, we'll make our mark. But we only have until midnight. | == == == The Democrats spent $11 million attacking us and outspent us 3:1. They spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation... and now, Pelosi's handpicked candidate has declared a rematch. With the Democrats already organizing against us, meeting our goal now is the only way to ensure we have the resources to take on our opponent and win. The House Majority hinges on the outcome of this race. == Friend, Michelle came to America as a young woman in search of opportunity. After witnessing the broken political system and unjust taxes tear down her mother's small business, she knew she had to step up and fight on behalf of small business owners and California taxpayers. Michelle Steel is working to do just that, having returned over $400 million to California taxpayers already. ==** == == There's simply too much on the line for you to sit this one out. Thank you, Steph Team Steel == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: 2022 Poll
subject: Friend, are you committed to voting RED in 2022?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
If we want to lower taxes, balance the budget, protect private health insurance, and put hardworking Americans first, we have to start now.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MrT7FYOECyL6QibTzDeED5e14EQAl8OXdnVSL1fzMU_ZA8ghRjEndbEY-oAj_wyIe4t34BgtrMTFvWoaeIQFmKxDXRwvWDE_wPJJEteP9cAPS60oU-Tuho98AH9AgxJsiqtmiUAXkROjGyzudwy3zTj6MEZgUqv3jTq9UbeEiUY296RIk5RZmNEbIPnQvoYg3KFqwh_Xod5QsdsKDrNmtLIvHE1n2g913QtQqd5_x10RJ9PNfvG01RutWQ6E_e1GJ9h9y4mkt7tSYtmu3CTeIJucA66rlXv6qpqTR5PoYpwoBvqzMYAFZkncg0f1wh5-GQp9rbmFbXdtHho7MJ-sOjARr76rgWmaA9BgmPY85i0JQxzdiQPLAYqk0bT7lYnzv22ih9LGoaInJcXOBmOuJ_7MJ-TmQEzd&c=f3j38y8x88oWfLWPgSwXyjnx42HaS2vrEyxAFnvs99EFGxyYurbw2g==&ch=s84ID3Vkti75b5W-IErbxvARK7JPTA1CHFOB3namoFeo5hc3oRXorA==)
Friend, Nancy Pelosi controls the House. Chuck Schumer controls the Senate. Joe Biden is in the White House. But their margin is slim. We need only flip a handful of seats from Blue to Red in the House to win back the House Majority and with the Senate split 50/50, we need to flip only one to return to our conservative agenda.

[**That 's why, today, we're asking every member of our grassroots team the same question: Friend, are you committed to voting RED in 2022?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MrT7FYOECyL6QibTzDeED5e14EQAl8OXdnVSL1fzMU_ZA8ghRjEndbEY-oAj_wyIe4t34BgtrMTFvWoaeIQFmKxDXRwvWDE_wPJJEteP9cAPS60oU-Tuho98AH9AgxJsiqtmiUAXkROjGyzudwy3zTj6MEZgUqv3jTq9UbeEiUY296RIk5RZmNEbIPnQvoYg3KFqwh_Xod5QsdsKDrNmtLIvHE1n2g913QtQqd5_x10RJ9PNfvG01RutWQ6E_e1GJ9h9y4mkt7tSYtmu3CTeIJucA66rlXv6qpqTR5PoYpwoBvqzMYAFZkncg0f1wh5-GQp9rbmFbXdtHho7MJ-sOjARr76rgWmaA9BgmPY85i0JQxzdiQPLAYqk0bT7lYnzv22ih9LGoaInJcXOBmOuJ_7MJ-TmQEzd&c=f3j38y8x88oWfLWPgSwXyjnx42HaS2vrEyxAFnvs99EFGxyYurbw2g==&ch=s84ID3Vkti75b5W-IErbxvARK7JPTA1CHFOB3namoFeo5hc3oRXorA==)

Winning will be tough, but if we work together we can put in the work to spread our conservative agenda and win every last toss-up seat. If we want to lower taxes, balance the budget, protect private health insurance, and put hardworking Americans first, we have to start now.

**Take the survey using your unique link:**[**https://act.michellesteelca.com/vote-majority**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MrT7FYOECyL6QibTzDeED5e14EQAl8OXdnVSL1fzMU_ZA8ghRjEndbEY-oAj_wyIe4t34BgtrMTFvWoaeIQFmKxDXRwvWDE_wPJJEteP9cAPS60oU-Tuho98AH9AgxJsiqtmiUAXkROjGyzudwy3zTj6MEZgUqv3jTq9UbeEiUY296RIk5RZmNEbIPnQvoYg3KFqwh_Xod5QsdsKDrNmtLIvHE1n2g913QtQqd5_x10RJ9PNfvG01RutWQ6E_e1GJ9h9y4mkt7tSYtmu3CTeIJucA66rlXv6qpqTR5PoYpwoBvqzMYAFZkncg0f1wh5-GQp9rbmFbXdtHho7MJ-sOjARr76rgWmaA9BgmPY85i0JQxzdiQPLAYqk0bT7lYnzv22ih9LGoaInJcXOBmOuJ_7MJ-TmQEzd&c=f3j38y8x88oWfLWPgSwXyjnx42HaS2vrEyxAFnvs99EFGxyYurbw2g==&ch=s84ID3Vkti75b5W-IErbxvARK7JPTA1CHFOB3namoFeo5hc3oRXorA==)

We need only flip a handful of seats from Blue to Red in the House to win back the House Majority and with the Senate split 50/50, we need to flip only one to return to our conservative agenda. == Winning will be tough, but if we work together we can put in the work to spread our conservative agenda and win every last toss-up seat. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hKsnxIXMW4Wy4KVDNRwy0rPCorEeGcZQiQ9GePfRNxjT85WFnqwijJ9HiRV72SOdkzp0-Bxzfc3_hAhhXuOcIk6HoPZVlrKU6TXltoetJormm1gNVDbTZSJCDHERxUex6v7gkXmnUqU=&c=VlvEWKLViuLXqyzty2lwLEovSsUtz7AB7FzrylCsj6OFkPtO2xR4tg==&ch=-ulTcLqafPgDzeiGtksfdsDg6KNM8I_IkIHkoZc4tu-SynQ2iiMqeg==).

body:
Patriot,

I'm reaching out because you have been hand-selected to be the first patriot to take our Official Truth About Republicans Survey.

[**Take the Survey**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001od8o9mrQeYqmye3wCnB2GP_9Uoh_Tx_nR1sMR41PlOnidvOUmpm2H3PcJqZItNMPUIXPPbjWf-cFX7YwiYlTDw_e2N4LXwnIv4Gxg9ROlLbXz9M0V9R0N91tv7_Ps2-iF9bq0Uq0I1luGtS0e0n98UPOlksZaIRCWdHK9BPVG5GCC2rCOmrJGuq6IRgAk9jbqh6TUDg0n4ie_7NTF8EA8bVRdqzlz8OABlistXxASX7iO1BUvyX-J0RPh02O7kUcuX6CIFtQC6TZfTJOooDQQxfB2grtCeuIg-8onFQcNKT2iw5-Q3789O8ssZdBSTSG8HMuJ6-41SFIchSk1yo4oNnpD-cm1dWAu6Bwrmd9NTSukdi-hTSmUuM572Os3-G5jbrFjHHyrvI2IkXDdiQ5F96IuNasImny564MAH1iqthnvIdQ3EIcarHgFJS-Nk6OCNgouGxGHMGMGcuSXjAQ4WC7Fcfno7Uc0gawZpwWTmnh4GetpzggXm53FBeV7IRL&c=LnEMOuC1Sf1ssFedxCQA1Sc3ho1Bv9GWoTO8H35WStWfPxv37E_ROg==&ch=C_B1caYvMLjdi8__poKXdiD3YU5l5gnrKlW6O5_UzywWMC17yP8DGw==)

I don't want to take up too much of your time, but as a top Conservative, your input is desperately needed.

We've only selected a small group of people to participate in this critical survey, so your help is essential.

We will use your critical input to help us create a winning strategy as we continue our efforts to take back our majority from Nancy Pelosi.

[**Can I count on you to take 2 minutes of your time to give top Conservative leaders and me your input?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001od8o9mrQeYqmye3wCnB2GP_9Uoh_Tx_nR1sMR41PlOnidvOUmpm2H3PcJqZItNMPUIXPPbjWf-cFX7YwiYlTDw_e2N4LXwnIv4Gxg9ROlLbXz9M0V9R0N91tv7_Ps2-iF9bq0Uq0I1luGtS0e0n98UPOlksZaIRCWdHK9BPVG5GCC2rCOmrJGuq6IRgAk9jbqh6TUDg0n4ie_7NTF8EA8bVRdqzlz8OABlistXxASX7iO1BUvyX-J0RPh02O7kUcuX6CIFtQC6TZfTJOooDQQxfB2grtCeuIg-8onFQcNKT2iw5-Q3789O8ssZdBSTSG8HMuJ6-41SFIchSk1yo4oNnpD-cm1dWAu6Bwrmd9NTSukdi-hTSmUuM572Os3-G5jbrFjHHyrvI2IkXDdiQ5F96IuNasImny564MAH1iqthnvIdQ3EIcarHgFJS-Nk6OCNgouGxGHMGMGcuSXjAQ4WC7Fcfno7Uc0gawZpwWTmnh4GetpzggXm53FBeV7IRL&c=LnEMOuC1Sf1ssFedxCQA1Sc3ho1Bv9GWoTO8H35WStWfPxv37E_ROg==&ch=C_B1caYvMLjdi8__poKXdiD3YU5l5gnrKlW6O5_UzywWMC17yP8DGw==)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is fighting in the Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bc98/18e32a7f/482e51d2/7b20222f/2698200307/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email_2021?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bc98/18e32a7f/482e51d2/7b20222c/2698200307/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bc98/18e32a7f/482e51d2/7b20222d/2698200307/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bc98/18e32a7f/482e51d2/7b202229/2698200307/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bc98/18e32a7f/482e51d2/7b20222b/2698200307/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bc98/18e32a7f/482e51d2/7b202222/2698200307/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Bill Olson
subject: Deal with it Biden.... I'm back!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw)
---
Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a Swing district](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.**

If my name looks familiar, it should. I nearly pulled off the shock of the year in 2020, winning more votes in my district than any Republican ever had... _and nearly beating liberal Democrat incumbent Darren Soto_.

I came closer than anyone ever had- because I proudly stood by President Trump during the whole campaign.

To me, he was the best President we ever had. I respect him for his fight, for his accomplishments, for standing up for us against the Swamp!

[ ](secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st)
---

Now, I see that he is not starting a new political party, but working to retake the GOP.... to purge the RINOs and make the party a fighting force for working people. According to Politico:

_A top political aide to former President Donald Trump spent the weekend quietly reassuring Republican senators that the former president has no plans to start a third party — _and instead will keep his imprint on the GOP.__

_“The president wanted me to know, as well as a handful of others, that the president is a Republican, he is not starting a third party and that anything he would do politically in the future would be as a Republican,” recounted Sen. Kevin Cramer (R-N.D.).**“The Republican Party is still overwhelmingly supportive of this president.”**_

Just as our President isn't giving up, just as he is trying to make the GOP a force for the people, I will not gibe up either. I have fought for our freedoms since I was a boy, my sons have done so after me, and we will not stand by and let Biden destroy this country we love!

_**Today, I announce my bid to be the next Congressman from Central Florida!**_

My opponent, Darren Soto, STILL doesn't get it. He just voted AGAIN - second time in a year- to impeach the President.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw)
---

The first vote to impeach nearly cost him his seat. I won more votes than any Republican ever has in my seat!

_Can you imagine what I can do after a SECOND vote to impeach?_

Darren Soto isn't MAGA. He hates the President and does not vote in the interest of the people of Central Florida.

**I am an America First patriot- and I will fight for America just as Trump does!**

The Dems and their media allies are putting out lies. We need to get the REAL truth out to defend ourselves and protect our freedoms \- and for that, can[ you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need to raise an additional $6,900 by the end of this month to pay for the needed advertising!

**The Democrats are going to lose, they have gone overboard! I will beat them **- [with your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw)

_Let's get this done!_
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw)
---
Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. [I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP! ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=h_GQU4v.yL8vIic&b=_jU_BhLG9GwG0hXsOgYpaw)Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rJxM7KwsTLTsLGxMTBzMnLRGtCwc7KyMnGzM) [Change subscriber options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rJxM7KwsTLTsLGxMTBzMnLRGtCwc7KyMnGzM)

subject: This is How we Beat One-Party Rule in D.C.
body:
Within less than two weeks, the Biden Administration is laying the groundwork to kill tens of thousands of jobs and advance their version of... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dd158a236bf4/this-is-how-we-beat-one-party-rule-in-dc?e=24057c0240)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter: Attorney General Morrisey was a guest on Fox News again this morning, sharing his thoughts on President Biden’s radical actions and how he plans to combat them as a leader in the Defend America movement.
---
| | [ ](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=b354b5da2a&e=24057c0240)
---
| President Biden’s unhinged executive actions have set forth many destructive policies that would be disastrous for West Virginia and America. _**Within less than two weeks, the Biden Administration is laying the groundwork to kill tens of thousands of jobs and advance their version of the Green New Deal. Attorney General Morrisey commented that this would be “President Obama’s Clean Power Plan on steroids.”**_ As a leader of the effort which created a 159 party coalition to halt President Obama’s Clean Power Plan in 2016, Attorney General Morrisey is now using those same skills to defeat the latest round of Biden overreach. _**With one-party rule in D.C. right now, the last line of defense for rule of law, freedom-loving Americans are the Republican attorneys general.**_ _**Defeating a President’s incredibly aggressive, overreaching policies that seem more conducive to making the far-left happy than mainstream Americans, requires the right people to stand up and act.**_ Patrick is working night and day to Defend America from the onslaught of executive policies bypassing our legislative branch. He will not stop until your civil rights are protected, your jobs are secured against Biden’s actions, and our Republic is preserved. Will you contribute and do your part to Defend America from these anti-jobs policies?
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: Within less than two weeks, the Biden Administration is laying the groundwork to kill tens of thousands of jobs and advance their version of... | | | | | | Dear Peter: Attorney General Morrisey was a guest on Fox News again this morning, sharing his thoughts on President Biden’s radical actions and how he plans to combat them as a leader in the Defend America movement. | | | President Biden’s unhinged executive actions have set forth many destructive policies that would be disastrous for West Virginia and America. Within less than two weeks, the Biden Administration is laying the groundwork to kill tens of thousands of jobs and advance their version of the Green New Deal. Attorney General Morrisey commented that this would be “President Obama’s Clean Power Plan on steroids.” As a leader of the effort which created a 159 party coalition to halt President Obama’s Clean Power Plan in 2016, Attorney General Morrisey is now using those same skills to defeat the latest round of Biden overreach. With one-party rule in D.C. right now, the last line of defense for rule of law, freedom-loving Americans are the Republican attorneys general. Defeating a President’s incredibly aggressive, overreaching policies that seem more conducive to making the far-left happy than mainstream Americans, requires the right people to stand up and act. Patrick is working night and day to Defend America from the onslaught of executive policies bypassing our legislative branch. He will not stop until your civil rights are protected, your jobs are secured against Biden’s actions, and our Republic is preserved. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Asks U.S. Supreme Court to Uphold Court Ruling Requiring Hillary Clinton Email Testimony
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a petition for writ of certiorari (“cert petition”) with the U.S. Supreme Court asking it to take up its challenge to an appeals court order exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails. Judicial Watch argues the court should hear its case because the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit erred in giving Clinton unwarranted special treatment that conflicts both with Supreme Court precedent and the precedents of other courts of appeal, including its own.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 31, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52774&L=21939&F=H&) | **[Senator on Panel that Oversees IRS asks Tax Agency to Strip Conservative Group of Nonprofit Status Over COVID-19 “Superspreader” Events](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52774&L=21939&F=H&)** Reminiscent of the Obama Internal Revenue Service’s (IRS) witch hunt of conservative groups, a U.S. Senator who sits on the committee that oversees the tax agency is pushing it to revoke a student charity’s nonprofit status. The veteran lawmaker, Rhode Island Democrat Sheldon Whitehouse, says the conservative student organization, Turning Point USA, should lose its nonprofit rating because it held large events that could help spread COVID-19. In a letter to IRS Commissioner Charles P. Rettig the senator describes the gatherings as “superspreader” events. He specifically mentions a Palm Beach, Florida winter gala at the Mar-a-Lago Club famously owned by former President Donald Trump. Days after a Soros-backed prosecutor who vows to lock up fewer criminals became Los Angeles District Attorney, the city’s mayor is forcing all employees to undergo “implicit bias” training to be conducted by a group that receives funding from Soros and his Open Society Foundations (OSF). That makes L.A. County and its biggest city, the nation’s second-most populous, a stronghold of the powerful Soros machine that aims to promote the left’s agenda. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it filed a petition for writ of certiorari (“cert petition”) with the U.S. Supreme Court asking it to take up its challenge to an appeals court order exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails. Judicial Watch argues the court should hear its case because the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit erred in giving Clinton unwarranted special treatment that conflicts both with Supreme Court precedent and the precedents of other courts of appeal, including its own. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 31, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Reminiscent of the Obama Internal Revenue Service’s (IRS) witch hunt of conservative groups, a U.S. Senator who sits on the committee that oversees the tax agency is pushing it to revoke a student charity’s nonprofit status. The veteran lawmaker, Rhode Island Democrat Sheldon Whitehouse, says the conservative student organization, Turning Point USA, should lose its nonprofit rating because it held large events that could help spread COVID-19. In a letter to IRS Commissioner Charles P. Rettig the senator describes the gatherings as “superspreader” events. He specifically mentions a Palm Beach, Florida winter gala at the Mar-a-Lago Club famously owned by former President Donald Trump. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced that it filed a petition for writ of certiorari (“cert petition”) with the U.S. Supreme Court asking it to take up its challenge to an appeals court order exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails. Judicial Watch argues the court should hear its case because the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit erred in giving Clinton unwarranted special treatment that conflicts both with Supreme Court precedent and the precedents of other courts of appeal, including its own. = ---|--- | | | | | America has a new administration, and Judicial Watch is working hard to defend the Left’s ongoing attacks on election integrity, the Constitution, and our nation’s laws. Whether it’s undermining your constitutional rights, promoting unrestricted illegal immigration, or silencing concerns about corruption, the Biden presidency is likely to be worse than the Obama Administration, Fitton explained. “You’re a terrorist if you object....that’s their thinking.” Fitton remarked that Biden’s inauguration speech was “a dogwhistle to the Left and to Big Tech ... keep on taking steps to effectively outlaw dissent here in the United States.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Billionaire George Soros’s radical leftism is spreading through America’s most populous county. Days after a Soros-backed prosecutor who vows to lock up fewer criminals became Los Angeles District Attorney, the city’s mayor is forcing all employees to undergo “implicit bias” training to be conducted by a group that receives funding from Soros and his Open Society Foundations (OSF). That makes L.A. County and its biggest city, the nation’s second-most populous, a stronghold of the powerful Soros machine that aims to promote the left’s agenda. = ---|--- | | | == The Washington Times The false narrative that Democrats concocted to hobble the Trump administration four years ago is now the real deal with Joe Biden and his family. And unlike President Trump, who faced unprecedented institutional resistance and Deep State resistance, President Biden can likely count on the Justice Department and the media to allow him to escape meaningful scrutiny. == Breitbart I’ve joined many others, including the President of the United States, in being locked out of Twitter for posting a tweet about hydroxychloroquine that I posted time and time again and that Twitter had already found to be in compliance with its rules. Without warning, Twitter told me that not only did I have to take it down but that even if I did I’d be locked out for seven days. = Judicial Watch As Judicial Watch argues in its cert petition, granting Clinton this extraordinary relief flies in the face of the D.C. Circuit’s own precedent, most recently in the Michael Flynn case, who, unlike Clinton, was denied mandamus relief. = = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Team Hawley
subject: FWD: Recent Missouri Statewide Survey & Fundraising Data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
We recently came out of the field with a statewide Missouri voter survey, and the news for Senator Hawley is very good. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=f035126333084c1d845831c5a20f7218&_e=YrkbD0QLDMDdUP8Oeq7Foy5fe-Lp8g0d8Uck3tiP-wAhKvHvEDWJyYpvg4IaeC53k5ZSa79chZP9yb0BqcYSi-VUq72_a77qS5d2-NXut5NPbPvfwO-8MogdJZRBI_cOJDS-1-s5MuSE5PDHhMdrFdqwO_elTTwhZfzM6McffciiT6r2KKYFGDi9ZJyJpvb8ga0sKTnXalz2qnQFH1fmzOW289KUdZ4rJxibLZI0_M6ooYIexsWuNRGiRqQpKH0acPLGoNJDmnOhP1wDPF530s4-srf8rFRqBeNHAphNcOHX-ekxNGG-6Rkb12Rw5UGUA9k3b7AUNTL-MlyLGfGahr6nlcaUpTJSjBV32b7FEqU%3D) **MEMORANDUM** | |
---
**TO: Team Hawley**
**FROM: Wes Anderson**
**DATE: February 1, 2021**
**RE: Recent Missouri Statewide Survey & Fundraising Data**
|
---
We recently came out of the field with a statewide Missouri voter survey, and the news for Senator Hawley is very good. Despite the aggressive attacks by national Democrats, special interest groups, and many in the media, a strong majority of Missouri voters have rallied to Senator Hawley.

The same is also true of the fundraising data we have seen over the past month. Despite much ink being spilled about corporate political action committee (PAC) support being paused and three donors separating themselves from Senator Hawley, the Hawley campaign has seen a surge in financial support — raising nearly $1 million in January with thousands of new donors.

**Hawley’s Job Approval**

Missouri Scout just released a statewide survey (Jan 27-28) that shows Senator Hawley’s job approval at 46% approve to 40% disapprove. It’s hard to overstate the importance of this finding. For three weeks the Democrats have thrown everything they have at Senator Hawley, slandering him with every name they can imagine, including Hitler. The net result? **More Missouri voters approve of the job Hawley is doing in the Senate than do not.** His support in Missouri is firm.

**Hawley’s Objection to Pennsylvania Certification**

We also asked the voters if they agree or disagree with the following statement:
_“Josh Hawley was well within his constitutional duty as a senator to object to the Pennsylvania election results, which he believes were unconstitutional due to the states flagrant disregard of its own laws.”_
**A strong majority (57%) of Missouri voters agree with that statement while only 37% disagree.** The partisan splits on this question are stark! The vast majority of both Republicans (88%) and Independents (61%) agree with that statement. At the same time, only 14% of Democrats agree, while 80% disagree. On the issue of Senator Hawley’s objection to the certification of the electoral results for Pennsylvania, Missouri Democrats are the odd man out.
|
---
|
---

**Second Impeachment**

We also asked Missouri voters if they favor or oppose Democrat efforts to impeach President Trump a second time. **Again, a strong majority (58%) oppose this impeachment.** As you would expect, it’s the same story, Independents and Republicans oppose while most Democrats support the second impeachment.
|
---
|
---
Perhaps Democrats believe the strategy of hyper-partisan polarization helps them nationally, despite the evidence to the contrary. Regardless, this survey clearly demonstrates that such a strategy is deadly for the Democrats in Missouri and actually serves to further strengthen Senator Hawley’s support at home.

**Hawley’s Fundraising Surge**

Media outlets and pundits have tried to make hay over the past few weeks because some corporate PACs paused donations to Senator Hawley and three Missouri donors stated they would no longer support the Senator. Here’s the reality — the three donors that received a lot of headlines have not donated a single penny to the Hawley campaign since 2017, and the corporate PACs that have stopped donating account for a VERY small percentage of total fundraising that is more than offset by a huge surge in grassroots support.

Since January 1, the Hawley campaign has raised $969K. This includes 12,000 new donors. The donations are an average size of $52. The campaign has $2.1 million in the bank.
It is crystal clear that a strong majority of Missouri voters and donors stand firmly with Senator Hawley, in spite of the continued false attacks coming from the radical left.

|
---

**Methodology**

This survey was conducted by OnMessage Inc. Telephone interviews were conducted on January 26-28. This survey consists of 800 likely general election voters and was stratified by county to reflect historic voter trends. The margin of error for this survey is +/- 3.46 %.

**Our Record**

Wes Anderson is a leading GOP pollster with 25 years of experience in opinion research. As a founding partner, Wes now leads the polling divisions of OnMessage Inc. and OnMessage Sports, providing political and corporate clients with a full spectrum of quantitative and qualitative opinion research products. For his stellar work in the 2018 election cycle, which included Senate wins in MO and FL, Wes Anderson was named as the 2019 American Association of Political Consultants (AAPC) "Pollster of the Year.” You can read more about Wes Anderson at [onmessageinc.com](onmessageinc.com).
|

name: Moms for Stacey
subject: Stacey Abrams deserves a Nobel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24517896/270972531/-536903251?refcode=0201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhOTBjNDRmLWY3NjQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E9Kbv3v7q94falltL6kvG8TKvh7rzu0z-UZSUPzGq-Y=)
Peter,
It's only fitting that this year, Black History Month kicked off with the nomination of Stacey Abrams for the Nobel Peace Prize. As a Black woman who motivated and organized Black voters, there is no doubt that Stacey was pivotal in saving our democracy.
Before the November elections and during the Georgia runoffs, Stacey Abrams' organization, Fair Fight, worked tirelessly with organizers and volunteers on the ground to provide crucial electoral college votes to President Biden, as well as to support Democratic candidates down the ballot. Moms in Office supported their work, and we want to show Stacey our appreciation by continuing to fundraise for Fair Fight.
[Show your appreciation for Stacey Abrams' work to save democracy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24517897/270972532/-536903251?refcode=0201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhOTBjNDRmLWY3NjQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E9Kbv3v7q94falltL6kvG8TKvh7rzu0z-UZSUPzGq-Y=)
Every day, we're inspired by Stacey in our own work. There is no doubt that she is truly deserving of the Nobel Peace Prize.

Thanks for all you do,
Elisa Cardnell
Executive Director, Moms in Office
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24517898/270972533/-536903251?refcode=0201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhOTBjNDRmLWY3NjQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E9Kbv3v7q94falltL6kvG8TKvh7rzu0z-UZSUPzGq-Y=)

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: End the filibuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This is how we put bold climate legislation within reach.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6396%2E53494%2E5TRdtZ) Friend, Democrats have control of the House and Senate. (Are you tired of hearing that yet? Didn't think so.) But the Democratic majority is razor-thin, and the filibuster still threatens to impede the progress we've been pushing for. The filibuster—an archaic Senate "rule" that's nowhere in the Constitution—effectively gives Republicans veto power over legislation by requiring bills to have the support of 60 senators in order to be brought to a vote. As long as the filibuster—or the fossil fuel filibuster, as we sometimes call it—remains in place, so do all of our plans to make bold change during this administration. **That's why we're calling to eliminate it.** **[If you support ending the filibuster so we can make progress on the climate crisis and so much more, sign our petition to make your voice heard right now.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2011?t=4&akid=6396%2E53494%2E5TRdtZ)** | [END THE FILIBUSTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2011?t=5&akid=6396%2E53494%2E5TRdtZ)
---
President Biden is doing what he can to address climate change through executive orders. But executive orders are temporary. They don't always last beyond the administration that issued them, and they're no replacement for bold, legally binding legislation.
To make progress on climate change, voting rights, gun control, immigration reform, statehood for D.C. and Puerto Rico, and so much more, we can do one of two things: We can wait endlessly for Republicans to have a change of heart (so we can reach that 60-vote threshold more easily, more often), or eliminate the filibuster (so Democrats can pass legislation with a simple majority).
We're going to have far more success with the latter.
There are signs that the filibuster could be in its waning days. In negotiating a power-sharing agreement with new Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Mitch McConnell asked for a guarantee that the filibuster would remain in place for at least two years. He knows just how "dangerous" a filibuster will be to the fossil fuel interests that power his campaigns. Leader Schumer knows better than making that promise.
Support for ending the filibuster is growing among Democratic senators, and we need to encourage those who are still on the fence to support it while they have the power. They need to hear from Americans who are calling for action loudly. They need to hear from you.
**[Add your name to call for the Senate to end the filibuster, so we can finally put bold climate legislation within reach.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2011?t=6&akid=6396%2E53494%2E5TRdtZ)**
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Executive Director, Evergreen Action
[SIGN ON ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2011?t=7&akid=6396%2E53494%2E5TRdtZ)
---

Derek, We’ve asked a lot of you the last few weeks -- so today, I’ll get straight to the point: Thanks to you, we reached our end-of-month goal of raising $25,000 last night. **Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.** When I set out to run for Governor of Virginia in 2021, I knew it would only work if we had an army of grassroots supporters across our Commonwealth united in calling for bold, progressive leadership. **Well, I’m pleased to report that this campaign has received donations from more than 10,000 individual grassroots supporters -- and we’re just getting started.** I’m ready to keep doing the work to build on the progress we’ve made -- and I’m so grateful to have you with me. Let’s keep marching, Terry

name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Morrisey?=
subject: This is How we Beat One-Party Rule in D.C.
body:
Within less than two weeks, the Biden Administration is laying the groundwork to kill tens of thousands of jobs and advance their version of... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=24057c0240&u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=6408a421b2)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter: Attorney General Morrisey was a guest on Fox News again this morning, sharing his thoughts on President Biden’s radical actions and how he plans to combat them as a leader in the Defend America movement.
---
| | [ ](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=e44debb894&e=24057c0240)
---
| President Biden’s unhinged executive actions have set forth many destructive policies that would be disastrous for West Virginia and America. _**Within less than two weeks, the Biden Administration is laying the groundwork to kill tens of thousands of jobs and advance their version of the Green New Deal. Attorney General Morrisey commented that this would be “President Obama’s Clean Power Plan on steroids.”**_ As a leader of the effort which created a 159 party coalition to halt President Obama’s Clean Power Plan in 2016, Attorney General Morrisey is now using those same skills to defeat the latest round of Biden overreach. _**With one-party rule in D.C. right now, the last line of defense for rule of law, freedom-loving Americans are the Republican attorneys general.**_ _**Defeating a President’s incredibly aggressive, overreaching policies that seem more conducive to making the far-left happy than mainstream Americans, requires the right people to stand up and act.**_ Patrick is working night and day to Defend America from the onslaught of executive policies bypassing our legislative branch. He will not stop until your civil rights are protected, your jobs are secured against Biden’s actions, and our Republic is preserved. Will you contribute and do your part to Defend America from these anti-jobs policies?
---
|
